scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:e2e && echo check completed successfully
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:types && pnpm run lint:format && pnpm run lint:issues && echo lint completed successfully
scripts.lint:format: oxfmt --check && echo lint:format completed successfully || (echo Please run pnpm run lint:format:fix to automatically fix formatting issues && exit 1)
scripts.lint:format:fix: oxfmt --write && echo lint:format:fix completed successfully || (echo Please run pnpm run lint:format to check for remaining formatting issues && exit 1)
scripts.lint:issues: oxlint --type-aware --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives && echo lint:issues completed successfully || (echo Please run pnpm run lint:fix to automatically fix linting issues && exit 1)
scripts.lint:issues:fix: oxlint --fix --fix-suggestions --fix-dangerously --type-aware --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives && echo lint:issues:fix completed successfully || (echo Please run pnpm run lint:issues to check for remaining linting issues && exit 1)
scripts.lint:types: tsgo -p tsconfig.app.json && tsgo -p tsconfig.node.json && echo lint:types completed successfully || (echo Please fix type errors and run pnpm run lint:types to check for remaining type issues && exit 1)
scripts.test: vitest run && echo test completed successfully || (echo Please fix test errors and run pnpm run test to check for remaining test issues && exit 1)
scripts.test:e2e: playwright test && echo test:e2e completed successfully || (echo Please fix e2e test errors and run pnpm run test:e2e to check for remaining e2e test issues && exit 1)
